postBodyPreview: 20d  • General 💭Strategies1 great video with the proper hooks, 1 great offer in the end of it(do you show your offer before a sales call?). 1 epic video ad - ending with a brief notion of 1 epic offer - and a summoning to "see if you are qualified for a call".Thoughts on this thought process ? As c
reply:
Love the thought process, brother.

One clear hook. One sharp offer. One simple path to the call. That wins.

And yeah, if the offer is strong enough, say it out loud. Repetition builds belief. Curiosity does the rest.

Just don’t hide behind ad testing forever, bro. Cold gets you sharp fast. Content and ads stack on top.

You’re close. Keep it clean and ruthless.
